title: Clever LMS Connect - API Reference
heading: Districts
content:
## Districts

GET /districts/<district\_id> (District LMS status)  
Includes LMS integration information in the District object. Sample Request Body  
_(No Request Body for GET requests)_  
Sample Response  

```json
{
  "data": {
    "id": "5800eb48a6d68b0223000001",
    "name": "Demo District",
    "lms_state": "success"
  }
}
```

  
Required fields and values  

Parameter / Field

Location

Type

Notes

`district_id`

Path

String (ObjectID)

**Required.** Allowed values for lms\_state: \["success", "matching\_in\_progress", "disconnected", "error", ""\]

  
**Unsupported fields**  
_(None)_  
**LMS-specific data quirks**  
_(None)_
